2606.15333.title: Replay What Matters: Off-Policy Replay for Efficient LLM Reinforcement Unlearning
2606.15333.paper_summary: LLM unlearning has emerged as a cost-effective alternative to full retraining for removing hazardous knowledge from pretrained models while preserving general utility. Recent RL-based methods such as RULE reformulate unlearning as learning a refusal behavior, but their on-policy optimization repeatedly samples from the same forget and retain/boundary prompts throughout training. We identify a critical inefficiency in this process: easy cases quickly converge and provide little useful gradient signal, while hard cases near the forget/retain boundary continue to produce low-reward rollouts that are discarded after a single use. To address this issue, we propose ReRULE, an off-policy replay enhancement for reinforcement unlearning. ReRULE stores low-reward hard-case rollout groups in a replay buffer during early GRPO training and reuses them in later stages through importance-sampled off-policy updates, redirecting computation toward boundary cases that still require learning. Theoretically, we show that ReRULE yields a tighter hard-case convergence bound than pure on-policy RULE. Empirically, ReRULE improves MUSE-Books Retain Quality from 46.3 to 56.2 while adding only 5--11% training time across benchmarks. Its limited improvement on the simpler TOFU setting further supports the intended conditional behavior: replay is most beneficial when the hard/easy disparity is pronounced.
2606.15333.paper_summary_zh: LLM 的去學習已成為一種經濟有效的替代方案，用於從預訓練模型中移除有害知識，同時保持一般效用。最近基於強化學習的方法，例如 RULE，將去學習重新定義為學習拒絕行為，但它們的政策優化在訓練過程中不斷從相同的遺忘和保留/邊界提示中進行取樣。我們識別出這一過程中的一個關鍵低效：簡單案例迅速收斂，提供的有用梯度信號很少，而接近遺忘/保留邊界的困難案例則持續產生低獎勵的回合，這些回合在單次使用後被丟棄。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 ReRULE，這是一種針對強化去學習的非政策重放增強技術。ReRULE 在早期的 GRPO 訓練中將低獎勵的困難案例回合組存儲在重放緩衝區中，並通過重要性取樣的非政策更新在後期階段重用它們，將計算重定向到仍需學習的邊界案例。理論上，我們表明 ReRULE 產生的困難案例收斂界限比純粹的政策 RULE 更緊。實證上，ReRULE 將 MUSE-Books 的保留質量從 46.3 提高到 56.2，同時在基準測試中僅增加 5--11% 的訓練時間。在較簡單的 TOFU 設定中，其有限的改進進一步支持了預期的條件行為：當困難/簡單的差異明顯時，重放最具益處。
2606.15333.author: Zirui Pang et.al.
2606.15333.authors: Zirui Pang, Chenlong Zhang, Haosheng Tan, Zhuoran Jin, Jiaheng Wei, Zixin Zhong
